## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Related issue

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass with `pytest tests/ -s -q`
- [ ] New tests were added for new functionality
- [ ] CSS changes are in `src/assets/custom.css` only
- [ ] No `html.Style()` usage was added
- [ ] ARIA attributes are on `html.*` elements, not `dbc.*` components
- [ ] UI changes were manually tested with at least one screen reader
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` was updated for user-visible changes

Describe screen reader behavior before vs after this change.
